condition_description: JavaScript code answers to programming questions

responses.How do you write data to a file?:
const fs = require('fs');
fs.writeFileSync('filename.txt', 'Data to write', 'utf8');
responses.How do you implement a simple trie-based: class Trie{constructor(){this.root={};this.endSymbol='*'}insert(word){let node=this.root;for(let char of word){if(!(char in node))node[char]={};node=node[char]}node[this.endSymbol]=true}autocomplete(prefix){let node=this.root;for(let char of prefix){if(!(char in node))return[];node=node[char]}const suggestions=[];this.dfs(node,prefix,suggestions);return suggestions}dfs(node,currentPrefix,suggestions){if(this.endSymbol in node)suggestions.push(currentPrefix);for(let char in node){if(char!==this.endSymbol)this.dfs(node[char],currentPrefix+char,suggestions)}}};const trie=new Trie();['apple','app','application','banana'].forEach(word=>trie.insert(word));console.log(trie.autocomplete('app'));
